name: Organon & Co.
description: Organon & Co. is an independent global healthcare company dedicated to improving the health of women throughout their lives. Headquartered in Jersey City, New Jersey, the company focuses on a diverse portfolio that includes women's health, biosimilars, and established brands. With over 70 medicines and devices, Organon addresses a wide range of conditions, including reproductive health, cardiovascular disease, dermatology, and respiratory issues. By delivering innovative therapies to more than 140 markets worldwide, the company strives to create a better and healthier every day for every woman, supporting her health journey from adolescence through menopause and beyond.
